title: Exploring Nim language - Writing a ransomware

title: Offensive API Hooking
snippet: IntroductionHooking is not a new concept as we know by now, many AV/EDR vendors use this technique to monitor suspicious API calls. In this blog post, we’ll explore API hooking but from the offensive point of view. We’ll use API Monitor to investigate which API calls used by each program then, us...
